responseJson.title: responseJson
responseJson.description: JSON envelope containing the action result. On success (ok=true), the data array contains: userName, learningRubricId, learningRubricName, learnerProfileId. On error (ok=false), the data array contains one of: outWrongLearningRubric, outNoAttemptReasons, or outTranscriptMissing with error content. Check the summary field for a human-readable description.
